headline: Trump 🍊💪 Lifts Iran Blockade 🚢🔓 Khamenei 😤🤝 'Desperation Deal' 🤑🔥
text:
US Navy 🚢⚓ YEETED the Iran BLOCKADE 🚫🔓 after Trump 🍊🤝 signed the DESPERATION DEAL 🤑💦 with Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei 😤👴 who said Trump 'used EVERY LEVERAGE' 💪📉 like a broke gamer 🕹️💸 begging for skins! Khamenei approved the 14-POINT MO 💣📜 but warned 'NO ACCEPTING ENEMY VIBES' 🖕😤 even tho he hasn't been SEEN since his dad got YEETED in Feb strikes 💥👴!

Deal CENTERS on Strait of Hormuz REOPEN 🔓🌊, Iran NUKES 🚫☢️ NEVER, and a THICC $300BN 💰🏗️ fund for Iran RECONSTRUCTION 🛠️🍑 tho US ain't PAYING A DIME 🪙❌! 60-DAY TALK CLOCK ⏰💨 starts NOW, in-person CHATS ☕🤝 coming but 'NOT SURRENDER' 🔥🛡️!

Trump 🍊 posted on TRUTH SOCIAL 🐦📱 expecting CEASEFIRE on ALL FRONTS 🕊️⚔️ including Israel-Hezbollah beef 🥩🇮🇱, while Vance 👨‍⚖️🗣️ says Iran WON'T SEE CASH 💸 or SANCTION RELIEF 🚫 until they TORCH enriched URANIUM 🧪🔥 and STOP FUNDING PROXIES 🛑💣!

Republicans like Bill Cassidy 😡🤬 called it the 'WORST BLUNDER IN DECADES' 📉💩, salty that Iran learned 'THREATEN THE STRAIT = WIN' 🏆😏! Vance clapped back 🖐️💥 telling Israeli critics Ben Gvir & Smotrich 🧔🇮🇱 to 'WAKE UP & SMELL REALITY' ☕🌍 cuz Israel can't just KILL their way outta PROBLEMS 🔪😩!

Netanyahu 🤝🇮🇱 stressed US BROMANCE but both sides still SLAPPING in Beirut 💥🏙️ with Vance warning 'CIVILIAN STRIKES NOT ACCEPTABLE' 🙅‍♂️💔! Pakistan 🇵🇰 said Swiss signing ceremony CANCELLED ✍️🚫 cuz it was already REMOTE-SIGNED 📲🤝, Vance might jet to Switzerland 🛫🏔️ but 'Iran's HARD TO LEAVE' 😅✈️!

White House 🏛️📢 says TECH TALKS ASAP while Middle East countries must KEEP THE PEACE VIBES 🌍🕊️ or the ORGY of NEGOTIATIONS 💦📜 goes SIDEWAYS! No BUBBLE here bby, just Trump 🍊🍆 fixing the region like he fixes tweets 📱🔥!
